data.name: My Little Career
data.detailed_description:
《我的小事業》是一部僅供成人閱讀的視覺小說。 一個來自遙遠郊區的年輕女孩成為攝影模特的故事。 大企業的世界比她想像的要復雜得多，但她會不擇手段。

愛麗絲是一位有抱負的模特。 出生在一個遙遠的郊區，21歲時，她憑著頑強的毅力來到了大城市，決定開始攝影模特的職業生涯，但到目前為止，成績還很有限：她設法 只能在一家極其本地化的模特經紀公司裡混下去，只能為本地雜誌拍攝照片，任何名字和名氣都是不可能的。 這些費用勉強夠付房租，她還需要吃飯、穿衣，如果可能的話，還要玩得開心。 因此，她每天在當地一家咖啡館兼職做服務員，夢想著登上頂級雜誌的封面。 到目前為止，還沒有成功，但所有最有趣的事情都在前面。 下一步是什麼？ 玩《我的小小事業》就能找到答案。

遊戲特色：

主角的扣人心弦的故事和情感旅程。
獨特的角色和發達的角色。
豐富多彩的視覺風格和令人愉悅的配樂。
親密而鼓舞人心的氛圍。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

data.name: My Little Career
data.detailed_description:
My Little Career is a visual novel for adults only. The story of a young girl who moved from a distant suburb to the big city to become a photo model, but everything is not so easy, the world of big business is much more complicated than she expected, but she will stop at nothing.

Alice is an aspiring model. She comes from a distant suburb, where with the help of great persistence at the age of 21 she got out to the big city, where she decided to start her career as a photo model, but so far the results are modest: she managed to get through only in an extremely local modeling agency, gets only on shoots for local magazines, there is no talk about any name and fame. The fees are barely enough for rent, and she needs to eat, dress and if possible have fun. So she works part-time as a waitress in a local cafe, every day, dreaming to shine on the covers of top magazines. So far, without success, but all the most interesting things are ahead of her. What's next? Find out by playing My Little Career.

Game Features:

A gripping story and emotional journey of the main character.
Unique characters with well-developed characters.
Colorful visual style and pleasant soundtrack.
Intimate and inspiring atmosphere.
